name: Cooling Tower Degradation Cascades to Zones A & B
description: A single Zone F cooling tower fault simultaneously degrades Zone A reactor cooling and Zone B compressor cooling.
purpose: Clearest "no single sensor sees this" case

steps.note: Zone F cooling tower outlet temperature climbing toward Critical.
Zone A reactor cooling flow degrading from the same Zone F fault.
Zone B compressor vibration rising from reduced cooling water — same root cause as Zone A's degradation, invisible without cross-zone correlation.
